must_detect.matched_text:
Internal Compliance Memorandum — Aurora Ventis SE (EU issuer) — MAR/GDPR/CSRD–SFDR coordination re pre-disclosure sustainability KPIs and financing.
The Company is admitted to trading on the regulated market of NovaReg Market in the Union, and the competent financial authority of the Republic of Obermark is our home authority; the below evaluates inside information and data protection controls.
Ms. Elina Voren, Head of Sustainability, DoB 1 9 8 5-11-02 (age 40), office Rhein‑Mitte Campus, uses device av-lt09 (s erial AV- LT09-0 1 3), session ref 8e-77-19, user handle evoren@auroraventis.eu, and extension 044‑88‑ 1 1, for CSRD ESRS E1 data consolidation.
Her team account acc: AV-SE-SUST-004, VPN node eu‑rm‑vpn12, and meeting room E‑203 were used for file staging at h ttps://intra.auroraventis.eu/sess?id=7f3c b9&loc=Rhein‑Mitte&seg=E1‑beta, with device MAC noted as a2:4c:7e:xx:12 (obf.).
Art 9 GDPR risk arises because vendor forms included optional trade‑union affiliation and biometric door‑log hashes; DPIA‑2026‑SUST must be refreshed and special category data removed or subject to SCCs and encryption in transit.
Cross‑border transfer: PineCircle Analytics SARL (processor) mirrors non‑final CSRD/SFDR PAI metric files to Lyravia for model runs under SCC set SCC‑2026‑AV‑3, transfer tool id TT‑0 9 2, with AES‑256 and EU‑only key escrow.
MNPI assessment under EU MAR: the unannounced 2026 guidance revision and a draft PPA with Solvica Wind Cooperative (expected Scope 2 reduction 34%) plus potential green bond sizing are precise, non‑public, and likely price‑sensitive until the board approves the CSRD note and press release.
The insider list segment “Project Emerald” (list id PRJ‑EMR‑ 118) is maintained by Secretariat, with timestamps 15/09/2026 08:30–10:00 CET and access restricted; market sounding is not initiated and no selective disclosure occurred.
For context only, public‑source benchmarks from regional climate registries and generic demographics (e.g., middle‑aged residents in coastal areas, junior analysts by band) are aggregated; no MAC addresses were stored in that dataset.
The following identifiers appear in a template unrelated to any person: birth year 1977; city Eastport; device model FieldTab X3; ac c o un t EU‑RM‑00452; sample IP 10.25.0.14; these placeholders should not be treated as identifying.
Trading restrictions: maintain a blackout for persons discharging managerial responsibilities and close associates until publication on NovaReg Market’s disclosure portal; apply Article 18 MAR insider list updates after each draft change.
Sustainability finance tie‑ins intersect SFDR Article 4 PAI indicators; avoid embedding bank account numbers or customer‑level meter IDs in ESRS E1/E2 workbooks, and prefer pseudonymous facility codes.
Contact Compliance at compliance@auroraventis.eu or via https://comms.auroraventis.eu/brief?case=AV‑MNPI‑2026‑ 41&locale=de‑DE; records management ticket RM‑ 2 8 0 7 is logged.
